description: READ-ONLY access to the on-disk image library (7 category folders + 2 loose root JPGs). Enforces the 'MUST keep images in their existing folders' behavioral rule (claude.md #2). NEVER add a write permission to this file — that breaks the read-only invariant. Companion: capabilities/app-writable.json. SOP: architecture/08-tauri-filesystem.md § Path Scopes #1. As of 2026-05-24, scope is widened from a single absolute path to multi-drive globs because the project root is now resolved at runtime by lib/config.ts (the original hardcoded scope would break on every machine that wasn't sara's laptop). The Tauri capability layer is no longer the primary security boundary for the image library — defense-in-depth at the lib layer (assertInsideRoot in tauri-fs.ts) enforces that every fs call stays inside the resolved root, regardless of how broad this glob list is. See claude.md Maintenance Log 2026-05-24 for the full trade-off rationale.
